output.verificationContext: Post-fix verification for DQA-001 (dark mode btn-tertiary hover contrast)

screenshotsCaptured.note: Firefox and Webkit fail at 375w on this long test page (browser timeout). 375w verified in Chromium.

dqa001Verification.originalIssue: btn-tertiary VIEW RESOURCE text on resource/policy cards in dark mode became low-contrast when hovered directly
dqa001Verification.fixApplied: Added CSS rules in Archive.css forcing color: var(--color-charcoal) !important on .archive.dark .card-resource/.card-policy .btn-tertiary in base, hover, focus, group:hover states

darkModeHoverResourceCard.observation: When first resource card is hovered (accent/lime background), VIEW RESOURCE text is clearly dark/charcoal with strong contrast. Readable.

darkModeHoverPolicyCard.observation: When first policy card is hovered (accent/lime background), VIEW RESOURCE text is clearly dark/charcoal with strong contrast. Readable.

lightModeHoverResourceCard.observation: Light mode resource cards show VIEW RESOURCE in charcoal text. All three cards visible and readable.

darkModeDefaultState.observation: REGRESSION: On non-hovered dark mode cards, VIEW RESOURCE text is invisible. Charcoal text on charcoal card background (dark:bg-charcoal). Figma shows light/off-white text on non-hovered dark cards.

output.compositionGate: FAIL - Regression found in dark mode default state

issues.element: btn-tertiary VIEW RESOURCE on dark mode resource/policy cards (default state)
issues.figmaValue: Light/off-white text on dark card background (non-hovered state)
issues.implementationValue: Charcoal text (var(--color-charcoal)) on charcoal card background -- invisible
issues.difference: Text completely invisible due to same-color foreground/background
issues.recommendation: Remove the base-state selectors from the dark mode CSS override. Only the group:hover and standalone :hover/:focus states should force charcoal color. The base .archive.dark .card-resource .btn-tertiary and .archive.dark .card-policy .btn-tertiary selectors (lines 186, 193 in Archive.css) must be removed from the rule.

files.verification: After fix: non-hovered dark cards should show light/off-white VIEW RESOURCE text (inherited from dark mode parent). Hovered cards should show charcoal VIEW RESOURCE text.

passedChecks: Dark mode hover on resource card btn-tertiary: charcoal text, readable on accent background
Dark mode hover on policy card btn-tertiary: charcoal text, readable on accent background
Light mode hover on resource card btn-tertiary: charcoal text, readable on white/accent background
Overall layout and composition matches Figma at all breakpoints
Cross-browser consistency verified (Chromium, Firefox, Webkit) at 768, 1024, 1440
output.summary: DQA-001 hover fix partially works: hovered cards correctly show charcoal text on accent background. However, the fix introduced a regression (DQA-002): the base-state selectors also force charcoal on non-hovered dark cards, making VIEW RESOURCE text invisible (charcoal on charcoal). Fix: remove the two base-state selectors (.archive.dark .card-resource .btn-tertiary and .archive.dark .card-policy .btn-tertiary) from lines 186 and 193, keeping only the :hover, :focus, group:hover, and group:focus-within selectors.
